seo.title: Building Data Extraction with Agno + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build data extraction with Agno + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Agno is a lightweight, model-agnostic framework for building multi-modal AI agents that excel at structured data extraction from unstructured documents. Integrating Vex provides essential guardrails to ensure schema compliance, field accuracy, and completeness in high-stakes extraction pipelines. This guide shows how to wrap Agno's agent.run() with Vex verification to mitigate common failure modes in data extraction workflows.

architectureOverview.heading: Data Extraction Architecture with Agno
architectureOverview.description:
The typical Agno data extraction architecture starts with a schema-guided Agent configured with tools for document parsing and structured output generation. Documents (PDFs, images, text) are fed into the agent via a run() call, which orchestrates LLM calls with Pydantic models for output validation. The agent maintains session memory for context across multi-page documents while coordinating multimodal inputs.

Key components include a central Agent instance with custom Tools for OCR/preprocessing, a structured OutputParser for schema enforcement, and optional Team agents for parallel extraction across document sections. The workflow processes unstructured input → agent reasoning → structured JSON output, but is prone to hallucinated fields and schema violations without verification.

Vex integration wraps the critical agent.run() call to verify outputs against predefined checks for completeness, type consistency, and semantic accuracy before downstream consumption.

risks.name: Multi-modal agent misinterpreting image or audio inputs
risks.description: OCR failures or visual hallucination in table extraction from scanned PDFs
risks.mitigation: Vex field accuracy checks with fuzzy matching and cross-verification

risks.name: Agentic session memory recalling fabricated past interactions
risks.description: Agent invents previous page data when processing multi-page documents
risks.mitigation: Vex completeness validation ensuring all required fields populated

risks.name: Structured output failing validation on complex nested schemas
risks.description: Pydantic validation fails on deeply nested invoice line items or org charts
risks.mitigation: Vex schema compliance with recursive type checking

risks.name: Team agent coordination producing contradictory sub-results
risks.description: Parallel extraction agents return inconsistent totals across document sections
risks.mitigation: Vex semantic consistency checks across coordinated outputs

implementation.title: Basic Agno Agent for Invoice Extraction
implementation.description: Create a schema-guided agent for extracting structured invoice data from text/documents
implementation.code:
from agno.agent import Agent
from agno.models.openai import OpenAI
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

class Invoice(BaseModel):
    invoice_number: str = Field(..., description="Unique invoice ID")
    date: str = Field(..., description="Invoice date")
    total_amount: float = Field(..., description="Total invoice amount")
    line_items: list[dict] = Field(default_factory=list)

agent = Agent(
    model=OpenAI(id="gpt-4o"),
    output_type=Invoice,
    instructions="Extract all invoice details accurately from the document."
)

result = agent.run("Invoice #12345 dated 2024-01-15 total $2,500...")
print(result)

implementation.title: Multi-modal Document Processing
implementation.description: Handle image/PDF inputs with preprocessing tools for robust extraction
implementation.code:
from agno.agent import Agent
from agno.tools.text import TextTool
from agno.models.openai import OpenAI

agent = Agent(
    model=OpenAI(id="gpt-4o"),
    tools=[TextTool()],
    instructions="Process document images and extract structured data"
)

# Process image or PDF
result = agent.run("Extract invoice data from this image: [image_url_or_bytes]")
print(result.data)

implementation.title: Team Agent Coordination for Complex Documents
implementation.description: Parallel extraction across document sections with aggregated results
implementation.code:
from agno.agents import Team
from agno.agent import Agent

header_agent = Agent(name="Header", instructions="Extract header data")
line_items_agent = Agent(name="LineItems", instructions="Extract all line items")
totals_agent = Agent(name="Totals", instructions="Extract totals and summary")

team = Team(agents=[header_agent, line_items_agent, totals_agent])
result = team.run("Multi-page financial report...")
print(result)

implementation.title: Custom Output Validation with Pydantic
implementation.description: Enforce strict schema compliance with custom validators
implementation.code:
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, validator
from typing import List
from agno.agent import Agent

class LineItem(BaseModel):
    description: str
    quantity: int
    unit_price: float
    @validator('quantity')
    def quantity_positive(cls, v):
        if v <= 0: raise ValueError('Quantity must be positive')
        return v

class Invoice(BaseModel):
    line_items: List[LineItem]
    total: float

agent = Agent(output_type=Invoice)
result = agent.run("Invoice with 2 widgets @ $10 each, total $25")
print(result)
